briefs.title: Gaming Control Act takes effect April 2026, updating rules for security guards at casinos and racetracks
briefs.summary: Starting April 13, 2026, BC's new Gaming Control Act replaces older gaming rules. Security guards working at provincial casinos or horse racing facilities must now meet updated registration and licensing requirements under the new law.
briefs.action_required: Confirm all security guards at your gaming or horse racing facility are registered or licensed under the new Gaming Control Act by April 13, 2026.

key_dates.label: BC Gaming Control Act takes effect — new security guard rules at casinos and racetracks
